info.title: LoreSafe API
info.description: Versioned contract for LoreSafe's spoiler-safe REST and SSE API. Governance and compatibility rules live in context/api-governance.md.

cookieSession.name: loresafe_session
cookieSession.description: Short-lived JWT stored only in a Secure, HttpOnly cookie.

operationsBearer.description: Dedicated operations token required only for metrics.

requestId.description: Server request correlation ID. Client x-request-id values are accepted only as 1-64 character trace-compatible tokens containing letters, digits, dot, underscore, colon, or hyphen; invalid values are replaced with a server UUID. Correlation IDs are not uniqueness or authorization keys.

Conflict.description: Request conflicts with current resource state.

TooManyRequests.description: Rate limit exceeded; retry after the advertised reset.

RateLimit.description: Structured limit, remaining quota, and reset parameters.

Retry-After.description: Seconds until a retry is permitted when present.

ServiceUnavailable.description: A required dependency is temporarily unavailable.
